title: April 15th, 2021 (2)
body:
- daily notes
    - akabilly
    - professional
        - why do you keep trying to box me lyrics
            - why do you keep trying to box me
            - i told you that is not me
            - stepped past the rope while you were watching
            - what p[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]] of this is not rocky do you not understand
        - when we speak past each other lyrics
            - when we speak past each other
            - nobody lied. we all tried. we're cross eyed and tongue tied
            - the kind of things we'd grow past as lovers
            - but don't dare abide if we can't trust us
            - to even acknowledge the space between us
            - if men are mars and women are venus
            - i'm a distant star system with a sometime hard penis
            - and that p[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]] is all yall can see me as
            - so i taught my dick to talk and y'all all say aww he's the sweetest
            - but when he perks up, says i got friends, do you wanna meet them
            - you run away and st[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]] screaming
            - and not necessarily in that order
            - it's all maybe later i was just leaving i mean staying i gotta get back to the station before the commercial break ends
            - i just happen to be the ballsy one
    - professional
